title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
